title: ajuga × knafii
intro: Ajuga × knafii, also known as two-leafed bugle or bugleweed, is a hybrid plant that is a cross between Ajuga reptans and Ajuga genevensis, both members of the mint family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its antiseptic, antibacterial, and anti-inflammatory properties, which can help to soothe and calm the body. The health benefits of Ajuga × knafii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, alleviate respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, and even help to lower blood pressure. The herbal preparations of Ajuga × knafii include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
